channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why AI startups are selling the same equity at two different prices
item.description: Some AI founders are using a novel valuation mechanism to manufacture unicorn status.

item.title: One startupâs pitch to provide more reliable AI answers: crowdsource the chatbots
item.description: CollectivIQ looks to give users more accurate answers to their AI queries by showing them responses that pull information from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude...

item.title: Who needs data centers in space when they can float offshore?
item.description: Offshore wind developer Aikido will deploy a small data center beneath a floating offshore wind turbine later this year.

item.title: Eight Sleep raises $50M at $1.5B valuation
item.description: Eight Sleep said it was free-cash-flow positive in 2025, and plans to use the new funding for new products, global expansions, and clinical validation...

item.title: L.L.Bean Promo Codes and Deals: Up to 75% Off Outdoor Gear
item.description: Find the best L.L.Bean promo codes and coupons for 10% off your first order, major sale discounts, free shipping on $75+, and extra savings for select...

item.title: How Journalists Are Reporting From Iran With No Internet
item.description: After strikes killed senior Iranian officials, Iran cut off internet access. Journalists are relying on satellite links, encrypted apps, and smuggled ...

item.title: Why Missile Alerts and War Updates Trigger Doomscrolling
item.description: A combination of war alerts, breaking news updates, and algorithmic feeds are trapping users in a threat-monitoring loop.

item.title: Best Pajamas for Women (2026), WIRED Tested and Reviewed
item.description: After testing 100-plus sets, these are the sleepwear brands that earned permanent spots in my closet and my bed.

item.title: A suite of government hacking tools targeting iPhones is now being used by cybercriminals
item.description: Security researchers say exploits used by governments to hack into iPhones have been found to be used by cybercriminals. They warned of an emerging ma...

item.title: The Untold Story of the Birth of the iPhone
item.description: Apple turns 50 on April 1. In his new book, Apple: The First 50 Years, David Pogue chronicles the secrecy-laden environment in which Steve Jobs willed...
